topic: Why current LLM costs are not sustainable
headline: LLM Costs Are Unsustainable
caption: As a full stack engineer, I see the rising costs of LLMs as a warning sign. Training and deploying these models require huge infrastructure investments, which may limit innovation and access. We need smarter models, efficient training techniques, and better resource management to make AI sustainable for everyone. It's exciting to build AI that scales responsibly rather than just chasing bigger models. 🚀 Are we ready to rethink how we develop and deploy these powerful tools? #AI #MachineLearning #TechInnovation
